channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: T'Wolves, Pistons players get into scrap during game, leading to multiple ejections
item.description: Players from the Minnesota Timberwolves and Detroit Pistons got into a heated skirmish on Sunday night in the second quarter of their game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida's Bennett Anderson sparks viral moment after flirty March Madness interview with ESPN student reporter
item.description: Andersen seemed distracted talking to ESPN Gainesville’s Talia Baia in the locker room. Baia is a student reporter at ESPN 98.1. She is studying journalism and communications at Florida.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 2025 Phillies Home Opener: What you need to know
item.description: Attention Phillies fans, the day is finally here! The Phils are getting ready to face off against the Colorado Rockies at Citizens Bank Park at 3:05 p.m. for their home opener. What can fans expect? Citizens Bank Park is SOLD OUT for Opening Day.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, PHL 17

item.title: Kyren Paris hits solo home run after long weather delay to lift Angels over White Sox 3-2
item.description: Kyren Paris homered on the first pitch he saw after a lengthy rain delay and the Los Angeles Angels rallied to beat the Chicago White Sox 3-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Suns star Kevin Durant helped off court after injuring left leg
item.description: Phoenix Suns All-Star Kevin Durant was helped to the locker room with 6:57 left in the third quarter against Houston on Sunday night after falling to the floor in a collision with the Rockets' Jabari Smith Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 players, 2 coaches ejected after Pistons-Timberwolves skirmish in 2nd quarter
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Five players and two coaches were ejected after a fight broke out in the second quarter in the Minnesota Timberwolves' victory over the Detroit Pistons on Sunday night. Detroit lost head coach J.B. Bickerstaff, center Isaiah Stewart, forward Ron Holland II and guard Marcus Sasser.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK DONNELLY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah snaps 3-game skid with 5-2 win at Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to fight for its slim playoff hopes. Alex Kerfoot had a goal and two assists for the Utah Hockey Club in a 5-2 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks at United Center on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 5 players, 2 coaches ejected as Detroit Pistons get into on-court brawl
item.description: Five players and two coaches were ejected Sunday after the Detroit Pistons got into an on-court brawl with the Timberwolves in the middle of the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Lauren Betts and UCLA reach first Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament, beating LSU 72-65
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Lauren Betts had 17 points and seven rebounds despite spending the entire second quarter on the bench, and top overall seed UCLA reached its first Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament with a 72-65 victory over LSU on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Judge homers again, Chisholm Jr. goes deep twice as Yanks rout Brewers 12-3 to complete 3-game sweep
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge homered in his first at-bat, Jazz Chisholm Jr. homered twice and the New York Yankees went deep four more times in a 12-3 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Sunday, a day after becoming the third team in major league history to hit nine homers in a game.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four, beating Duke 54-50 in March Madness
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley took a victory lap around the court, giving high-fives to fans and South Carolina's band and even autographing the rear end of a baby's pants. The Gamecocks' coach has her team back in a familiar place — the Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Paige Spiranac talks 'sexual favors' rumors at start of golf career
item.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac, who has millions of followers on social media, opened up on "sexual favors" rumors she faced early in her career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Pirates' Nick Gonzales suffers freak injury on home run, hits 10-day IL
item.description: Pittsburgh Pirates infielder Nick Gonzales' season got off on the wrong foot as he suffered a significant ankle injury on opening day against the Miami Marlins.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Red Sox DH Rafael Devers is 1st big leaguer with 10 strikeouts in 3 games to open a season
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Boston Red Sox designated hitter Rafael Devers has become the first major league player to strike out 10 times in the first three games of a season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox hammer Angels in lopsided Opening Day win
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The weather on White Sox Opening Day mirrored their franchise outlook heading into 2025. Murky, gray and dreary with little to be excited about besides the fact baseball season is all the way back. Good thing the White Sox played well in spite of the melancholy conditions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Will Applegate: Why Grand Junction's three-sport star chose baseball and his legacy on GJHS
item.description: Few local high school athletes have made an impact quite like Grand Junction High School's Will Applegate.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry listed as questionable for Golden State's Tuesday game in Miami
item.description: Stephen Curry is back with the Golden State Warriors after missing the first game of the team's road trip with a pelvic contusion, and could play when his team takes on the Miami Heat in Jimmy Butler's return game Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres Opening Day: What's new inside Petco Park
item.description: The baseball season has finally returned and San Diego Padres fans are getting amped to set foot back inside Petco Park. Here's what is new for fans inside the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC dealt first loss in inaugural season
item.description: San Diego FC lost its first game of the season thus far on Sunday when the club fell 2-1 to Austin FC at Q2 Stadium in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
